Class GenericDominators<T>

java.lang.Object
com.ibm.wala.util.graph.dominators.Dominators<T>
com.ibm.wala.util.graph.dominators.GenericDominators<T>
public class GenericDominators<T> extends Dominators<T>
Calculate dominators using Lengauer and Tarjan's fastest algorithm. TOPLAS 1(1), July 1979. This implementation uses path compression and results in a O(e * alpha(e,n)) complexity, where e is the number of edges in the CFG and n is the number of nodes.

Sources: TOPLAS article, Muchnick book
